testcases.input: url = "https://leetcode.com/problems/design-tinyurl" Output: "https://leetcode.com/problems/design-tinyurl" Explanation: Solution obj = new Solution(); string tiny = obj.encode(url); // returns the encoded tiny url. string ans = obj.decode(tiny); // returns the original url after decoding it.
